_meta.description: Auto-generated silver evaluation set for NHS Grampian Annual Report 2016/17. Answers produced by the pipeline (retrieval + Ollama generation) and filtered to generation_confidence=1.0. NOT human-verified.

queries.question: What was the total net expenditure for NHS Grampian in 2016/17?
What was the Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Grampian in 2016/17?
queries.expected_answer: The Core Revenue Resource Limit for NHS Grampian in 2016/17 was £984,007,000.

queries.question: What was the Capital Resource Limit for NHS Grampian in 2016/17?
queries.expected_answer: The Capital Resource Limit (CRL) for NHS Grampian in 2016/17 was £42,099,000.

queries.question: Did NHS Grampian report a surplus or deficit against its resource budget in 2016/17?
queries.expected_answer: An in-year surplus of £0.888 million was recorded for the year against a target of breakeven.

queries.question: What was the total operating expenditure for NHS Grampian in 2016/17?
queries.expected_answer: Total Hospital & Community Health Service Expenditure: £1,405,957,000

queries.question: How many whole time equivalent staff did NHS Grampian employ in 2016/17?
queries.expected_answer: Whole Time Equivalent staff employed in 2016/17: 488

queries.question: What was the sickness absence rate for NHS Grampian in 2016/17?
What percentage of A&E patients were seen within 4 hours at NHS Grampian in 2016/17?
queries.expected_answer: 96.0% of patients should wait no more than 4 hours from arrival to admission, discharge or transfer for accident and emergency treatment by September 2015

queries.question: What was NHS Grampian's efficiency savings or cost improvement target for 2016/17?
queries.expected_answer: NHS Grampian's efficiency savings target for 2016/17 was £26.470 million.
